mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, channel, amount_cent, status, subject, pay_trade_no, pay_url, expire_time, paid_time, callback_time, callback_payload, idempotency_key, biz_type, membership_pricing_config_id, membership_duration_months, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM recharge_order WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT FROM recharge_order WHERE expire_time <= #{beforeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND status != 'PAID' AND (callback_time IS NULL OR callback_time <= #{beforeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) ORDER BY expire_time ASC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_order ( order_no, user_id, channel, amount_cent, status, subject, pay_trade_no, pay_url, expire_time, paid_time, callback_time, callback_payload, idempotency_key, biz_type, membership_pricing_config_id, membership_duration_months, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{channel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amountCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{paidTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{callbackTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{callbackPayload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idempotencyKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{membershipPricingConfigId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{membershipDurationMonths,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
